## Summary

Describe the bug clearly in 1-3 sentences.

- [ ] MAME
- [ ] Pokemon VN
- [ ] Admin

## What happened

What did you expect to happen, and what happened instead?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to `...`
2. Open `...`
3. Click `...`
4. See error

## URLs or files involved

List relevant URLs, file paths, or script commands.

## Error text / screenshots

Paste the exact error text if possible.
